overall.description: First-person perspective from a bus driver's cabin in a bus simulator game, driving through heavy rain in an urban European environment. The bus navigates wet city streets with active windshield wipers, stops at a red traffic light behind a white truck, then proceeds through the intersection and pulls up to a bus stop where passengers board.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road with modern office buildings

agents.ego_description: driving bus through heavy rain on multi-lane city street with windshield wipers active, approaching intersection

entered.detail: bus driver instrument panel with speedometer and control buttons
active wipers clearing heavy rain from front windshield
tall contemporary office buildings with reflective glass facades
row of trees lining the right side of the wet street
rain-slicked multi-lane road with visible lane markings

segments.scene_description: The bus travels along a rain-soaked urban arterial road with modern glass office buildings visible through the downpour. Windshield wipers sweep continuously across the front glass as the vehicle approaches a traffic light intersection, with wet asphalt reflecting the grey overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection stopped at red traffic light

events.description: bus comes to a complete stop behind a white box truck at red traffic light
red sedan pulls up alongside the bus on the left side

agents.ego_description: waiting at red traffic light with bus stopped behind a white delivery truck

notable_agents.action: white box truck stopped at red light directly ahead of bus
red sedan stopped in adjacent lane to the left of the bus

entered.detail: large white delivery truck with closed cargo box stopped ahead
traffic signal showing red indicating stop

segments.scene_description: The bus is stationary at a red traffic light positioned behind a large white box truck. A red sedan pulls up alongside on the left, and rain continues to stream down the windshield as the wipers maintain their rhythmic motion. The surrounding urban buildings have given way to a more open intersection view.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with tram tracks

events.description: traffic light turns green and bus accelerates through the intersection
bus overtakes the white truck on the right side and continues down the street

agents.ego_description: accelerating through green light and continuing down wet commercial street, passing the white truck

entered.detail: low-rise commercial structures with storefronts and signage
metal tram rails embedded in the road surface
covered passenger waiting area with glass panels

segments.scene_description: The bus accelerates through the green traffic light, leaving the white truck behind as it proceeds down a commercial street lined with shops. Tram tracks run along the road center, and a bus stop shelter comes into view on the right as the vehicle continues through the persistent heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop with passenger boarding area

events.description: bus pulls over to the curb and stops at the bus stop shelter
front doors open and passengers begin boarding the bus

agents.ego_description: stopped at bus stop with doors open, allowing passengers to board from the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: passenger in white jacket entering through front door
passenger in brown shirt boarding the bus

entered.detail: modern building with large glass windows adjacent to the bus stop
raised concrete platform where passengers stand to board

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls up to a covered bus stop shelter, coming to a halt at the concrete boarding platform. The front doors open and passengers begin entering from the right side, stepping in from the rain-soaked sidewalk. The camera angle shifts slightly toward the open door as people board.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it navigates a rain-drenched urban corridor toward a passenger boarding point. It begins by traveling along a rain-soaked arterial road lined with modern glass office buildings, with windshield wipers sweeping rhythmically across the glass to clear the downpour. As the bus reaches a traffic light, the camera comes to a halt behind a large white box truck while a red sedan pulls up alongside under a grey, overcast sky. The scene then shifts as the bus accelerates through a green light, passing tram tracks and commercial shops before approaching a covered bus stop shelter on the right. Finally, the vehicle pulls up to the concrete platform and comes to a complete stop, with the camera angling slightly toward the open doors as passengers board from the rain-soaked sidewalk.
